parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const su = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.site_url || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const pl = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.permission_level || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); if (!su) return 'SELECT 1'; return `INSERT INTO gsc_sites (site_url, permission_level, last_synced) VALUES ('${su}', '${pl}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (site_url) DO UPDATE SET permission_level = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.permission_level = '' THEN gsc_sites.permission_level ELSE EXCLUDED.permission_level END, last_synced = NOW()`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const su=String($json.site_url||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const c=Number($json.clicks)||0; const i=Number($json.impressions)||0; const r=Number($json.ctr)||0; const p=Number($json.position)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO gsc_daily_overview (site_url,report_date,clicks,impressions,ctr,position,collected_at) VALUES ('${su}','${dt}'::date,${c}::integer,${i}::integer,${r}::numeric,${p}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (site_url,report_date) DO UPDATE SET clicks=EXCLUDED.clicks,impressions=EXCLUDED.impressions,ctr=EXCLUDED.ctr,position=EXCLUDED.position,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const su=String($json.site_url||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const q=String($json.query||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const c=Number($json.clicks)||0; const i=Number($json.impressions)||0; const r=Number($json.ctr)||0; const p=Number($json.position)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO gsc_queries (site_url,report_date,query,clicks,impressions,ctr,position,collected_at) VALUES ('${su}','${dt}'::date,'${q}',${c}::integer,${i}::integer,${r}::numeric,${p}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (site_url,report_date,query) DO UPDATE SET clicks=EXCLUDED.clicks,impressions=EXCLUDED.impressions,ctr=EXCLUDED.ctr,position=EXCLUDED.position,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const su=String($json.site_url||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const pg=String($json.page||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const c=Number($json.clicks)||0; const i=Number($json.impressions)||0; const r=Number($json.ctr)||0; const p=Number($json.position)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO gsc_pages (site_url,report_date,page,clicks,impressions,ctr,position,collected_at) VALUES ('${su}','${dt}'::date,'${pg}',${c}::integer,${i}::integer,${r}::numeric,${p}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (site_url,report_date,page) DO UPDATE SET clicks=EXCLUDED.clicks,impressions=EXCLUDED.impressions,ctr=EXCLUDED.ctr,position=EXCLUDED.position,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const su=String($json.site_url||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const co=String($json.country||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const c=Number($json.clicks)||0; const i=Number($json.impressions)||0; const r=Number($json.ctr)||0; const p=Number($json.position)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO gsc_countries (site_url,report_date,country,clicks,impressions,ctr,position,collected_at) VALUES ('${su}','${dt}'::date,'${co}',${c}::integer,${i}::integer,${r}::numeric,${p}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (site_url,report_date,country) DO UPDATE SET clicks=EXCLUDED.clicks,impressions=EXCLUDED.impressions,ctr=EXCLUDED.ctr,position=EXCLUDED.position,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const su=String($json.site_url||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const dv=String($json.device||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const c=Number($json.clicks)||0; const i=Number($json.impressions)||0; const r=Number($json.ctr)||0; const p=Number($json.position)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO gsc_devices (site_url,report_date,device,clicks,impressions,ctr,position,collected_at) VALUES ('${su}','${dt}'::date,'${dv}',${c}::integer,${i}::integer,${r}::numeric,${p}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (site_url,report_date,device) DO UPDATE SET clicks=EXCLUDED.clicks,impressions=EXCLUDED.impressions,ctr=EXCLUDED.ctr,position=EXCLUDED.position,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}
={{ (() => { const su = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.site_url || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `INSERT INTO refresh_log (property_id, status) VALUES ('${su}', 'done')`; })() }}

={{ (() => { let su=''; try { su = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.site_url || ''); } catch(e) { su = 'unknown'; } su = su.replace(/'/g, "''"); let errMsg=''; try { errMsg = String($json.execution.error.message || 'Unknown error'); } catch(e) { errMsg = 'Unknown error'; } errMsg = errMsg.replace(/'/g,"''").substring(0,500); return `INSERT INTO refresh_log (property_id, status, error_message) VALUES ('${su}', 'error', '${errMsg}')`; })() }}
